description.value: • Effect: Whenever you weave using your Primary Energy (Fire), add +[[/damage 4]] damage OR extend duration by 1 round. Power stolen doesn't flow smoothly—it erupts with raw force. This is a passive ability.

system.effect: Whenever you weave using your Primary Energy (Fire), add +4 damage OR extend duration by 1 round. Power stolen doesn't flow smoothly—it erupts with raw force. This is a passive ability.
